attributes.description: Alerts when `sqlserver.database.execution.errors > 0`. Any engine-reported execution errors warrant investigation.
attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] Execution errors

investigation_guide.blob:
## SQL Server execution errors

### What fired
Execution error counter increased during the window.

### Why it matters
The engine counts failed executions across the instance. Sustained counts usually correlate with deadlocks, permission issues, or application bugs.

### Triage
1. Correlate with deadlocks, lock timeouts, and memory grant pending counts.
2. Inspect application logs for the affected queries.

### Remediation
- Fix the root cause in the application or DB config.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero total.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Direct error count from the engine
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_errors = SUM(metrics.sqlserver.database.execution.errors),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE total_errors > 0
| KEEP instance_id, total_errors
